metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_292
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Expression of VAMP4 was investigated in area CA1 of the hippocampus by immunocytochemistry and immunoelectron microscopy. While prominent immunofluorescence staining was observed in the cell body layer (stratum pyramidale), distinct labeling was also observed in subsets of nerve terminals. Immuno-EM revealed sparse labeling of vesicular structures in presynaptic nerve ending, consistent with its presence on presynaptic endosomes.

5/2/2017 Pim
- Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: Dissociated hippocampal cultures were prepared from syb2 or SNAP-25 knockout mice and their littermate controls or Sprague Dawley rats using described protocols.
